name: python3-mistune
title: python3-mistune
description:
Markdown parser for Python 3
A fast markdown parser in pure Python, inspired by marked, also providing
renderer features.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-mistune because Markdown parser for Python 3.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-mistune as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-mistune with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-mistune --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
